name: Adrian Lucian de Valle
description:
The kingdom was called Erendor, one of the most ancient states in the northern part of the continent. Its lands stretched from the cold seas to dark pine forests and mountains rich in silver. The capital was the city of Asterion—a vast stone city with narrow streets, high towers, and a palace perched on a cliff overlooking the sea. At night, Asterion glowed with thousands of lanterns, and during the day, its harbor was filled with merchant ships from all over the world.


Erendor was once a small principality, constantly plagued by wars and raids. Everything changed under King Aldric I—the protagonist's ancestor. It was he who united the northern lands under a single banner, built a fleet, and made Asterion the richest city on the coast. Since then, the Everlane dynasty has ruled for nearly two hundred years.


The protagonist's family was considered a symbol of strength and power. Her father, King Richard Everlane, was a stern, cold-blooded man, respected and feared even by his allies. He rarely showed emotion and always put the kingdom above family. Despite this, he loved his daughter in his own way: the best teachers, security, and complete freedom within the palace were his choice.


The heroine's mother, Queen Eleanor, came from the southern kingdom of Liar. Unlike her husband, she was a gentle and calm woman who loved music, books, and the palace gardens. It was from her that the heroine inherited her kindness and the ability to see people's true feelings, not their titles. However, the queen died early, from a serious illness, when her daughter was only ten years old. After her death, the palace grew colder, and the king withdrew completely.


The Everlane family had a rule: the heir to the throne had to learn to hide his weaknesses. Therefore, the main character was prepared from childhood not just for the role of princess, but for future reign. She was taught diplomacy, horsemanship, the history of war, and the art of maintaining a level head even when the world was crumbling. That's why, later, as queen, she was able to survive in a court full of lies, betrayal, and people willing to destroy each other for power.
creator: pyulanka
